response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, and a proven track record in distributed systems and open-source tooling, but lacks demonstrable leadership in scaling AI-native fintech teams, explicit experience with real-time credit/risk systems, and evidence of governing hybrid engineering models or regulatory AI compliance — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven ability to build and scale event-driven, high-throughput systems (e.g., DLang microservices, GISCollective)
Strong engineering culture advocacy via workshops, TDD, CI/CD, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of leading engineering teams beyond 10 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
Lacks documented experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk modeling, or regulated AI deployment
No mention of multi-agent evaluation infrastructure, observability for auditable AI, or model-agnostic architecture design
